description: Apptigent provides business automation and integration products, including its PowerTools suite of utility APIs and connectors for custom applications and workflows. Its developer-facing offering centers on a unified set of utility endpoints for text, data, math, finance, date/time, and file operations.
summary: Apptigent exposes one documented HTTP API surface: the PowerTools Developer REST API at `https://connect.apptigent.com/api/utilities`, authenticated by an Apptigent-issued API key obtained through the customer portal.
